RULE_1: Table buys in for $20, players are issued 550 in chips (3×100, 6×25, 10×10). Blinds start at 10/20.
RULE_2: Unlimited re-buys until "last hand" for $20 and 550 chips. Cannot re-buy unless completely knocked out.
RULE_3: Timer starts at 45 minutes, after which blinds double to 20/40.
RULE_4: 45 minutes later, blinds increase to 30/60, timer decreases to 30 minutes.
RULE_5: Deal goes around the table one more time — this is the "last hand" for re-buys.
RULE_6: At end of "last hand", any player can top-up for $20 and receive 450 chips.
RULE_7: A player knocked out during "last hand" can re-buy and top-up for $40, getting 1,000 chips.
RULE_8: Blinds continue every 30 minutes: 30/60, 40/80, 50/100. No more re-buys.
RULE_9: Blinds can optionally freeze at 50/100 for three players, 100/200 for last three, 200/400 for heads-up.
CONTACT_POST: with everything you see here and the language it represents.
